description: Seed examples mapping user questions to retriever choices. Used as few-shot examples by MediaRetrievalAgent's LLM selector and copied into the intent classifier prompt (ai/prompts/intent_classifier_v1.yaml) as media_retrieval / hybrid_media seeds.

media_retrieval_examples.question: How many creators have audiences discussing gaming?
media_retrieval_examples.notes: Pure count; topic signal. When platform='all', the agent runs both youtube.* and tiktok.* and merges via Influencer dedup.

media_retrieval_examples.question: Which creators have audiences discussing vaping?
Show me videos whose comment sections discuss mental health.
Which videos are about energy drinks?
Which creators make content about gambling?
How many videos have comment sections discussing loneliness?
How many videos are about laughing gas?
How many videos discuss cannabis in comments?
Most popular videos where people discuss alcohol in comments.
media_retrieval_examples.notes: Engagement-weighted topic ranking (topic match * log comments).

media_retrieval_examples.question: Which popular creators have the biggest audience discussions about smoking?
How many TikTok creators talk about online gambling?
media_retrieval_examples.notes: Platform was pinned by the user.

media_retrieval_examples.question: Show me TikToks about energy drinks.
media_retrieval_examples.notes: Platform was pinned by the user.

unmapped_pending_product_definition.question: Which creators are most associated with the topic 'vaping'?
unmapped_pending_product_definition.reason: No retriever is a faithful match. The current top_creators ranks by sum(score * weight), which is volume-biased: a creator with many low-quality matches can outrank a creator with a few strong ones. Defining 'most associated' (mean of top-N scores? per-video specificity? exclusivity?) needs product input. Tracked as a follow-up; see the retriever_accuracy plan in the airflow_upgrade repo.

hybrid_media_examples.question: In Rotterdam Centrum, how many creators talk about vaping?
hybrid_media_examples.structural_filter: Persons in Area 'Rotterdam Centrum' who FOLLOW these creators (via Influencer -> HAS_ACCOUNT -> YouTubeChannel|TikTokUser)
hybrid_media_examples.notes: Two-stage: Stage 1 gets candidate creators via the topic-signal creator retriever; Stage 2 LLM Cypher counts how many of those creators are followed by Persons living in Rotterdam Centrum.

hybrid_media_examples.question: Among 15-year-olds, which creators have audiences discussing gambling?
hybrid_media_examples.structural_filter: Persons with age='15' who FOLLOW the candidate creators

hybrid_media_examples.question: In Feijenoord, how many videos are about vaping?
hybrid_media_examples.structural_filter: Videos published by channels followed by Persons living in Area 'Feijenoord'
hybrid_media_examples.notes: Video-content signal restricted to channels with local-following Persons.

hybrid_media_examples.question: Which TikTok creators are most popular with girls in IJsselmonde for gaming?
hybrid_media_examples.structural_filter: Persons with gender='female' (or matching female encoding) living in Area 'IJsselmonde' who FOLLOW the candidate creators
hybrid_media_examples.notes: Combines gender + area + platform filters with engagement ranking.
